thresholdSource: criticalLow 4.0 / criticalHigh 12.9: 'TP < 4.0 g/dl or > 12.9 g/dl' (Brown Health critical-values list — institutional tier; no gov/society panic value exists for total protein). plausibleHigh raised 12→15 so criticalHigh 12.9 stays inside the plausible fence (schema invariant); highest documented real value ~11.6 g/dL (Waldenström case, J Hematology).
